events.title: Family Storytime
events.description: A fun storytime for all ages! There are two times for Family Storytime at Valley Ranch on Tuesday night: 6:30 p.m. and 7:30 p.m. These are two separate storytime events but will be the same program repeated. Please pick up a free ticket at the reference desk in order to attend storytime. This helps us keep track of how many storytime folks we have.

events.title: Sewing Lab (Ages 13+) at the Central Library
events.description: 5:00 p.m.; Work on projects, cut patterns and connect with others. Participants can borrow patterns, use sewing tools, and receive help reading patterns or troubleshooting projects from makerspace staff. Sewing machines are available on a first-come, first-served basis.
